message.content:
@startuml
participant "alice" as alice {
}
participant "bob" as bob {
}

== message 1 ==
alice ->> bob : 
note right of alice #D3D3D3\nmessage 1\ndone note
activate bob
deactivate bob
return ok


== message 2 ==
alice ->> bob : 
note left of alice \nmessage 2 done note
activate bob
deactivate bob
return 


== message 3 ==
alice ->> bob : 
note over alice,bob#F0FFFF:message 3 done note
activate bob
deactivate bob
return 

@enduml
